uplink.description: TTN example 1: PAR + battery (protocol v2, device 657)
uplink._note: Upstream PAR formula 3*(raw/32768-1)*1000*5 on word 32873 = 48.065185546875, rounded to 2dp -> 48.07. battery word 3168 / 1000 = 3.168 V. Expected computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (oracle) and applying our rounding.

uplink.description: TTN example 2: battery only, PAR sensor flag clear
uplink._note: flags=2 (bit1 only): battery present, no PAR block. Oracle (reference/upstream-codec.js) emits only battery_voltage and the header.

uplink.description: Synthetic: PAR only, battery flag clear
uplink._note: flags=1 (bit0 only): PAR present, no battery block. Confirms air.par membership in isolation; oracle emits only photosynthetically_active_radiation and the header.
version byte != 2; oracle returns {error: "protocol version 1 doesn't match v2"}.
